zh.Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts: 法國皮卡迪艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可
zh.Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Laon, Aisne,: 法國皮卡迪艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可

zh.lifeSummary: 當Albéric de Coucy於0980年出生在法國皮卡迪艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可時，他的父親Léopold Léon DE COUCY31歲，母親Berthilde de Marle28歲。他和Adele de Roucy至少有1個女兒。他去世於1020年享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Albéric de Coucy于0980年出生在法国皮卡迪艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可时，他的父亲Léopold Léon DE COUCY31岁，母亲Berthilde de Marle28岁。他和Adele de Roucy至少有1个女儿。他去世于1020年享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Coucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Arabic   Khoury   or   Khouri   ‘priest’. Compare   Courey  ,   Couri  , and   Cury  .
French: habitational name from a place so named in Vienne.

variants.name: Khoury
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Nabil, Sami, Samir, Issa, Ibrahim, Ramzi, Bassam, Fouad, Habib, Issam, Jamil, Riad.  French Michel, Antoine, Emile, Pierre, Andre, Camille, Clemence, Clovis, Georges, Gisele, Henri, Jacques.

Arabic (mainly Lebanon, Syria, and Jordan): from khūrī ‘priest’, in particular a Christian priest. This surname is used among Christians, including Assyrians/Chaldeans. Compare Cory , Coury , Cury , Elkhoury , Khouri , Kory , Koury , and Kury .

nameMeanings.name: Albéric
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Learned form of Aubrey , derived from Latin Albericus in the 14th century. It enjoyed a slight and brief vogue in the 19th century, but is now rare.

en.lifeSummary: When Albéric de Coucy was born in 0980, in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, France, his father, Léopold Léon DE COUCY, was 31 and his mother, Berthilde de Marle, was 28. He had at least 1 daughter with Adele de Roucy. He died in 1020, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Albéric de Coucy est né en 0980, à Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, France, son père, Léopold Léon DE COUCY, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Berthilde de Marle, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Adele de Roucy. Il est décédé en 1020, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Albéric de Coucy 0980 in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Léopold Léon DE COUCY 31 und seine Mutter Berthilde de Marle 28. Er hatte mit Adele de Roucy mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1020 im Alter von 40 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Albéric de Coucy è nato il nel 0980 nel Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Léopold Léon DE COUCY, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Berthilde de Marle, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Adele de Roucy. Morì nel 1020, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts: フランスピカーディエイスンコウシ-レ-チaテアウ-アウフリク
ja.Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Laon, Aisne,: フランスピカーディエイスンコウシ-レ-チaテアウ-アウフリク

ja.lifeSummary: Albéric de Coucyが0980年にフランスピカーディエイスンコウシ-レ-チaテアウ-アウフリクで生まれた時，父Léopold Léon DE COUCYは31歳，母Berthilde de Marleは28歳であった。彼はAdele de Roucyとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1020年に40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Albéric de Coucy(이)가 0980년 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 코우시-레-cha테오-오프리크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Léopold Léon DE COUCY(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Berthilde de Marle(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Adele de Roucy(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1020년 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Albéric de Coucy nasceu em 0980, em Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, França, seu pai, Léopold Léon DE COUCY, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Berthilde de Marle, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Adele de Roucy. Ele faleceu em 1020, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Albéric de Coucy родился в 0980 г. в местности коуси-ле-чaто-ауффрику, эисн, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Léopold Léon DE COUCY было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Berthilde de Marle, 28. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Adele de Roucy. Он умер в 1020 г. в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Albéric de Coucy nació en 0980, en Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Léopold Léon DE COUCY, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Berthilde de Marle, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Adele de Roucy. Murió en 1020, a la edad de 40 años.
